description_long: This is a large, menacing axe with a robust, industrial design, featuring a thick, dark metallic blade with a unique, angular profile and a secondary pointed edge opposite the main cutting surface. The blade is attached to a mechanical-looking head with visible bolts, gears, and a reinforced structure, suggesting a hybrid of traditional and modern engineering. The handle is wrapped in a deep red, textured grip, likely made of leather or synthetic material, providing both comfort and slip resistance. The end of the handle is capped with a black, rounded pommel, adding balance and a secure grip. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, with a focus on durability and power, suitable for both utilitarian and combat scenarios. Subtle metallic highlights and a slightly worn finish give the axe a rugged, battle-tested appearance.
description: A heavy, industrial-style axe with a thick, angular black blade and a red-wrapped handle, featuring mechanical details and a robust, worn finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the axe, highlighting the curved, segmented blade and the red-wrapped handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the blade and the mechanical head, with the handle end visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the blade's angular geometry and handle grip clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's end and the back of the axe head, showing the alignment and thickness of the components.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical handle, straight with a thick red textured wrap for grip, likely leather or synthetic, ending in a rounded black pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Large, angular, single-edged blade with a secondary pointed edge, segmented lower edge, and mechanical detailing on the head.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern mechanical mounting with visible bolts and reinforced head structure.
